response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his resume lacks explicit depth in production-grade AI/ML systems, RAG architectures, or cloud-native AI deployment at scale, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentorship across diverse engineering domains (e.g., workshops, talks, and staff-level roles).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, directly relevant to agentic workflows and model context protocols.
Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS), enabling seamless integration with customer systems.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or designing RAG architectures.
No mention of vector databases, LLM performance metrics, or multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI) in resume.
Lack of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
